expectations.evidence: Analysis quotes specific lines from the instruction file (e.g., 'If after exhaustive review you find no substantive flaws...')
Analysis references artifact content (two-tier severity structure, specific finding IDs like NBC-14, VP-5) that could only come from reading the artifact

expectations.text: Agent presents a numbered list with at least 2 optimization points
Agent does NOT flag revisionCount as a warning (revisionCount is 0)
expectations.evidence: Output states 'Revision count: 0 (clean pass — no revision history as a signal; analysis is based on comparing the instruction file to what the artifact actually produced)'

expectations.text: Agent asks for approval before making any changes
expectations.evidence: Output ends with: 'Should I apply these changes to the instruction file? (yes to apply all, or list the numbers you want applied)'

expectations.text: No instruction files are modified during the run
expectations.evidence: Agent stopped at approval question; no Edit tool calls
